executive_summary: Implemented Phase 3 (Game Domain) and Phase 4 (Statistic Domain) as per SDD tasks. Modified game instance, level, segment level, feedback, professor, and game models. Added ended_at column, used GameStatus enum, changed FK columns to UUID type, added professor and game/level context to feedback with relationships. Fixed all references to start_instance.

changes: Renamed start_instance to started_at, added ended_at column
Changed student_id and game_id FK columns to UUID type
Changed level.game_id and segment_level.level_number_id FK columns to UUID type
Added professor_id (UUID, NOT NULL), game_id (UUID, nullable), level_id (UUID, nullable) columns to Feedback
Added relationships to Professor, Game, Level
Added feedbacks relationship to Professor, Game, Level
Updated test fixtures to use started_at instead of start_instance
Updated schema to include started_at and ended_at fields
Updated create_instance endpoint to set started_at
Updated end_instance endpoint to set ended_at

next_recommended: Generate Alembic migrations for the schema changes
Run tests to ensure no regressions
Update any other references to renamed columns in other parts of the codebase (if any)
Consider adding database indexes for foreign keys if needed
risks: Changing foreign key column types may require data migration in existing databases
Renaming start_instance may break existing queries/reports that rely on that column name
Relationships added between Feedback and Professor/Game/Level may need cascade delete rules
Potential performance impact of adding new foreign keys without indexes
